short_summary: Iran deal close, AI lawsuit, SpaceX
rationale: The Iran peace deal signals are the most impactful development for a US resident — potential end to a US-involved conflict and oil market stabilization; SpaceX/Musk milestone and AI lawsuit are secondary domestic-relevant stories.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach; UAE unlocks frozen funds
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal could end direct US military involvement, stabilize oil prices, and reduce Middle East risk — a meaningful positive shift for American consumers and markets.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT use
top_events.summary: A high-profile US lawsuit against OpenAI over AI safety could accelerate domestic AI regulation debates and affect how Americans interact with AI products.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
top_events.summary: SpaceX's market debut and Musk's wealth milestone reflect strong US tech/space sector momentum, with modest positive signal for market sentiment but limited direct impact on most Americans.
